## Problem statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.  Why does the current library
fall short for your use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.  If you have a specific
API in mind, sketch it out:

# Example of the proposed API

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered and why they are less suitable.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, papers, or external libraries that informed this
request.
